name: BBO vs Deep Book Divergence with Trade Flow Confirmation
hypothesis: A strong divergence between BBO and deep-book imbalance (obi_1 >> obi_ex_bbo) signals a potential short-term upward move. Requiring a confirmatory positive trade flow (z-score > 1.0) will filter out 'phantom' divergences caused by passive order cancellations and improve predictive accuracy.
mutation_note: Inspired by parent's strong h=1 performance. Added a trade flow confirmation filter (z-score > 1.0) and extended horizon to 5 ticks to test if this creates a more robust, slightly longer-term signal.
